description_long: This is a pair of circular hoop earrings with a latch-back closure, crafted from a metallic material with a dark, bronze-like finish. Each earring features five dangling spike-shaped pendants suspended from small rings evenly spaced along the lower half of the hoop. The spikes are elongated and pointed, giving the earrings a bold, edgy appearance. The hoops themselves are smooth and unadorned, providing a striking contrast to the intricate, angular dangles. The overall design is symmetrical, with both earrings mirroring each other perfectly. The construction suggests durability and a statement style, suitable for urban fashion.
description: A pair of dark metallic hoop earrings with five pointed spike dangles each, creating a bold and edgy look.
description_view_0: Front view showing both circular hoops and all five spike dangles on each earring clearly.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the hoops and the layered arrangement of the spike dangles.
description_view_2: Another front view, identical to view 0, displaying the full face of both earrings and their dangles.
description_view_3: Side view similar to view 1, highlighting the alignment and depth of the spike dangles.
